to: satisfy itself as to the matters falling within subsections (2) to (4)

conditions.text: making an activity direction (or imposing an activity condition by means of a child arrangements order)

to: obtain and consider information about the individual who would be subject to the direction (or the condition) and the likely effect of the direction (or the condition) on him

conditions.text: making such a direction (or such an order)

to: ask an officer of the Service or a Welsh family proceedings officer to provide the court with information as to the matters in subsections (2) to (5)

for: an officer of the Service or Welsh family proceedings officer
to: comply with any request from the court to provide information as to the matters in subsections (2) to (5)
